expectations.text: DDD contains actual hex color codes (#XXXXXX format)
DDD names specific font families, not generic 'sans-serif'
expectations.evidence: DDD names Instrument Sans (headings), Geist (body/nav/buttons), and JetBrains Mono (code/terminal)

expectations.text: DDD has specific pixel values for spacing and font sizes
DDD specifies at most 2 font families
expectations.evidence: DDD specifies 3 font families: Instrument Sans (headings), Geist (body), and JetBrains Mono (code/terminal). Three distinct font families are named.

expectations.text: All spacing values in DDD are multiples of 8
expectations.evidence: Spacing scale includes 12px and 20px which are not multiples of 8. The base unit is stated as 4px, not 8px.

expectations.text: Build plan contains forge CLI commands
expectations.evidence: Build plan contains forge insert frame, forge insert text, forge style, forge set-layout, forge insert stack, forge move, forge screenshot, forge publish commands

expectations.text: Build plan includes forge screenshot after sections
expectations.evidence: Phase 7 includes 'forge screenshot --id page', 'forge screenshot --id hero', 'forge screenshot --id pricing' commands

expectations.text: Build plan covers all 5 requested sections: hero, features grid, social proof, pricing, footer
expectations.evidence: Build plan covers Phase 2: Hero, Phase 3: Social Proof Logos, Phase 4: Features Grid (3x2), Phase 5: Pricing Table (3 tiers), Phase 6: Footer
